data.name: WebCam: Behind The Screen
data.short_description: Run a sizzling blog, fulfill your subscribers’ requests, delight them with hot photos, earn money, and treat yourself to stunning outfits—all while keeping your look flawless. Nothing will stop you on your way to becoming TOP-1!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: i5 6600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 TI / AMD Radeon RX 570
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound card with the latest drivers
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: i7 8700 or higher
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia RTX 3070 or AMD Radeon RX 6600 XT
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound card with the latest drivers

data.name: WebCam: Behind The Screen
data.detailed_description:
Step into the life of a rising webcam model in this immersive first-person simulation. Stream, seduce, and strategize your way to the top of the platform’s rankings. Earn tips from viewers, invest in dazzling outfits, maintain your flawless appearance, and balance your daily routine—showering, workouts, and more. Every choice affects your popularity, income, and well-being. Will you become the #1 streamer, or burn out chasing fame?

Model Customization

Create your character using the in-game character creator.

Weight Management

Monitor your character's stats. You can choose to skip meals or overeat, exercise or lead a sedentary lifestyle. All of this will affect your character's appearance.

Chat Interaction

Fulfill viewer requests or respond to messages to earn money and boost your popularity.

Foam Party

Make sure that your character is always clean, who would like to chat with a dirty girl?

Random Encounters

Periodically, various visitors will stop by, and you can have fun with them… Who knows which delivery guy will get lucky today?!

Embark on a journey from a broke student to the #1 model!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: i5 6600
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 TI / AMD Radeon RX 570
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound card with the latest drivers
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: i7 8700 or higher
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia RTX 3070 or AMD Radeon RX 6600 XT
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound card with the latest drivers
